title: [MTR3/4] Stepford Connect BR 158 Express Sprinter
description: A Stepford Connect Class 158 DMU ported from Transport Fever 2 into Minecraft using the MTR mod.
body:
# Overview
![Stepford Connect Class 158](https://i.imgur.com/UsbOG1i.png)
This resource pack adds a Stepford Connect livery for the British Rail Class 158 in Minecraft, using the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod. Stepford Connect is a fictional railway operator featured in the Roblox game Stepford County Railway (SCR), where it operates real-life inspired trains, including the Class 158, across a detailed and immersive virtual rail network.

This pack recreates the Stepford Connect livery as seen in SCR and applies it directly to the BR Class 158 model for Minecraft. It offers a unique blend of realism and virtual branding, ideal for fans of both British trains and the Stepford County Railway universe.

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Stepford County Railways.
